caption: The video features a man performing in front of an audience, likely in a classroom or small auditorium setting. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with blue floral embroidery and a red and white pendant. The man is holding a guitar and singing into a microphone, suggesting he is either playing music or giving a speech. The background consists of wooden blinds, and the heads of several people in the audience are visible in the foreground, indicating that they are attentively watching and listening to his performance. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the organization or event.
